steps.t: Laerdan is at Gath Forthnír. Golodir, crushed by his daughter's death, told you to leave him be and to go speak with the Elf Laerdan. <rgb=#FF0000&…
Golodir's gear was given to emissaries from the goblins, dwarves and nomads of Angmar. These emissaries can be found in the spires surrounding Barad G…
